landing.heroTitle: Pick your sport and get started
landing.heroDescription: Pick your sport to browse verified venues, see active groups, and contact organizers—every portal shares the same account.
landing.contactPrompt: Have new courts or groups to add? hello@racketthailand.com
landing.feedbackSubtitle: Already signed in? Tell us about bugs, feature ideas, or courts we should verify next.
landing.feedbackMessagePlaceholder: Describe the issue or idea so we can act on it.
landing.feedbackSuccess: Thanks! Your note is in our queue.
landing.feedbackError: We couldn't send that. Please try again.
landing.perspectivesTitle: How The Platform Works For Every Role
landing.perspectivesSubtitle: A quick flat-view walkthrough for court owners, group owners, and regular players.
landing.courtOwnerDescription: Keep your venue profile complete so players and groups can contact you faster.
landing.courtOwnerStep1: Publish court location, contacts, and key details
landing.courtOwnerStep2: Update photos, pricing notes, and opening hours
landing.courtOwnerStep3: Review and confirm group verification requests
landing.groupOwnerDescription: Run your group in one place and make it discoverable for the right players.
landing.groupOwnerStep1: Create your group profile with clear descriptions
landing.groupOwnerStep2: Post weekly schedules and contact channels
landing.groupOwnerStep3: Request court verification to increase trust
landing.regularUserDescription: Find where to play, who to join, and what is active this week.
landing.regularUserStep1: Search courts by sport and location
landing.regularUserStep2: Browse active groups and weekly sessions

sport.emptyDescription: Make sure the `sports` table has a row whose `code` matches this route and that SUPABASE_URL / SERVICE_ROLE_KEY are configured.
sport.featureEmpty: This module will populate automatically as soon as Supabase rows exist for this sport.
sport.carouselEmpty: As soon as new records are published for this sport, they will appear here.
sport.useNowDescription: Every portal already includes a live court finder and group finder.
sport.useNowCourtsBody: Browse verified venues with phone numbers, LINE IDs, and Google Maps previews.
sport.useNowGroupsBody: See weekly sessions, player counts, and organizer contacts so you can join right away.

community.boardSubtitle: Share announcements, organize meetups, or ask the sport community anything.
community.emptyState: No posts yet. Be the first to share an update.
community.success: Posted! Refresh the board to see it live.
community.error: Unable to publish. Please try again.
community.commentPlaceholder: Share an update or ask a follow-up…

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to manage your sport communities, matches, and courts in one place.
auth.signupSubtitle: One login unlocks all racket sports across every subdomain.
auth.passwordRequirements: Use at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, a number, and a symbol.

forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we’ll send a reset link. This also lets Google login users create a password for manual sign-in.
forgot.success: Check your inbox for a link to set a new password.
forgot.helper: We’ll send a secure link to set a new password.
forgot.cooldown: Please wait {time} before requesting another link.
forgot.error: We couldn’t send a reset email. Please try again soon.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.subtitle: Enter and confirm a new password for your account. This also lets Google sign-in users create a manual login.
reset.helper: After updating, you’ll return to the login page to sign in.
reset.sessionMissing: Password reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new email from the login page.
reset.errorWeak: Use at least 8 characters that include uppercase and lowercase letters, a number, and a special character.

auth.switchToLogin: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.agreeTerms: By continuing you agree to RacketThailand’s community guidelines and privacy terms.
auth.verifyNotice: Please verify your email before signing in. Check your inbox for a confirmation link.
auth.emailNotVerified: Email not verified. Please check your inbox for the confirmation link.
auth.pendingDescription: We sent a verification email to {email}. Click the link inside to activate your account. Can’t find it? Check spam or resend below.
auth.pendingResendSuccess: Verification email sent again. Check your inbox.
auth.pendingResendError: We couldn't resend the email. Please try again shortly.
auth.pendingStatusWaiting: Waiting for confirmation. Keep this page open and we'll notify you once it's ready.
auth.pendingStatusVerified: You're verified! Redirecting you to the homepage.
auth.pendingStatusError: Unable to contact Supabase to confirm your status. Please try again.
auth.pendingMissingUserId: We couldn't find your verification reference. Please return to the login screen and sign in again to generate a fresh verification link.

profile.title: Public profile
profile.subtitle: Update the information that appears across every RacketThailand sport experience.
profile.usernameHint: Only lowercase letters, numbers, or underscores. This becomes part of your public URL.
profile.avatarHelper: Square images (PNG, JPG, or WebP) at least 400px look best.
profile.usernameTaken: That username is already taken. Try another.
profile.genericError: Unable to update your profile right now. Please try again.
profile.sidebarDescription: Your profile travels with you across badminton, padel, pickleball, and any new sports we add.
profile.sidebarHint: Tip: Set a default sport so future portals land on the content most relevant to you.

courtFinder.title: Court finder for {sport}
courtFinder.subtitle: Search verified venues, filter by province, and get booking details for every racket sport hub.
courtFinder.searchPlaceholder: Search by court name, location, or keyword
courtFinder.emptyTitle: No courts match your filters yet
courtFinder.emptyDescription: Try removing some filters or check back soon as communities add more venues.
courtFinder.nearbyUnsupported: Location not supported in this browser.
courtFinder.nearbyDenied: Location access denied. Enable permissions to sort by distance.
courtFinder.nearbyActive: Sorting results by distance from you.

courtSubmission.title: Add a new court to the directory
courtSubmission.subtitle: Submit a venue so players can discover and contact it across Thailand. New entries go live immediately.
courtSubmission.subtitleRequestOnly: Submit a court request for moderator review. Approved requests are published to the public finder.
courtSubmission.successPending: Court request submitted. A moderator will review it before publishing.
courtSubmission.error: Unable to publish this court right now.

groupFinder.title: Group finder for {sport}
groupFinder.subtitle: Browse community groups and review their weekly sessions.
groupFinder.searchPlaceholder: Search by group, court, location, or keyword
groupFinder.emptyDescription: Adjust filters or add your own group to help others find a schedule.
groupFinder.nearbyUnsupported: Location not supported in this browser.
groupFinder.nearbyDenied: Location access denied. Enable permissions to sort by distance.
groupFinder.nearbyActive: Sorting groups by distance from you.

casualPlays.title: Casual plays for {sport}
casualPlays.subtitle: Browse one-off sessions that automatically expire after the play day.
casualPlays.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, court, location, or keyword
casualPlays.emptyTitle: No casual plays match your filters
casualPlays.emptyDescription: Try another date or publish your own one-off session.
casualPlays.nearbyUnsupported: Location not supported in this browser.
casualPlays.nearbyDenied: Location access denied. Enable permissions to sort by distance.
casualPlays.nearbyActive: Sorting plays by distance from you.
casualPlays.createSubtitle: Publish a one-off session that stays live until the end of the play day. Casual plays do not require court-owner verification.

form.title: Session title
form.courtHelp: Choose a court in the system, or leave it blank and enter the venue below.
form.venueNamePlaceholder: e.g., condo court, school gym, neighborhood park
form.locationNotePlaceholder: e.g., Court 3, meet at lobby, behind CentralWorld
form.playDateHelp: Choose the one play date for this session.
form.endTimeHelp: Leave this blank if you are not sure yet.
form.playerAmountHelp: Leave blank if there is no player limit.
form.skillRatingHelp: Optional. Show the player level you want for this play.
form.contactVisibilityHelp: Choose whether players can contact you directly or must request approval first.
form.error: Unable to create the casual play.

detail.ownerContactHelp: Contact details are shared with accepted players only.
detail.ownerContactPublicHelp: Public contact is enabled. Players can contact the organizer directly without sending a join request.
detail.ownerContactLocked: Request to join first. Once accepted, the organizer contact will appear here.

joinRequest.title: Request to join
joinRequest.subtitle: Send your contact to the organizer. They can accept or decline before sharing their contact.
joinRequest.loginPrompt: Sign in to request a spot in this casual play.
joinRequest.error: Unable to send join request right now.
joinRequest.contactRequired: Add a phone number or LINE ID so the organizer can contact you.
joinRequest.statusPending: Your request is pending. The organizer will review it soon.
joinRequest.statusAccepted: Your request was accepted. Organizer contact is available above.
joinRequest.statusRejected: Your request was declined. You can send an updated request if details changed.

ownerRequests.title: Join requests
ownerRequests.subtitle: Review player contacts and accept only the people you want in this session.
ownerRequests.empty: No one has requested to join yet.
ownerRequests.error: Unable to update this request right now.

edit.title: Edit casual play
edit.subtitle: Update the timing, court, or contact details for this one-off session.
edit.error: Unable to update the casual play.
edit.deleteError: Unable to delete this casual play right now.
edit.deleteConfirm: Delete this casual play? It will be removed from the listing.

admin.courtSubtitle: Use this form to onboard verified venues submitted by owners or via email.
admin.placeSearch: Search Google Maps for a venue
admin.placeSearchHelper: Start typing the court or mall name and pick the correct listing to auto-fill the form.
admin.placeSearchNoResults: No matches yet. Try a different spelling.
admin.placeAlreadyRegistered: This place is already registered as
admin.locationMissing: Location required. Use the Google Maps search above to import coordinates.
admin.error: Unable to save court. Check required fields.
admin.updateSubtitle: Update venue details. Changes go live once you save.
admin.deleteError: Unable to delete this court right now.
admin.deleteConfirm: Delete this court? Court photos and LINE QR images will also be removed.
admin.panelSubtitle: Manage courts, owners, and upcoming sport data sources.
admin.dashboardNavDescription: Track queues, counts, and urgent tasks across the app.

quickActions.addCourtDescription: Onboard verified venues and process pending court submissions.
quickActions.groupsDescription: Review community groups, edit details, and remove stale listings.
quickActions.casualPlaysDescription: Review upcoming one-off sessions and remove stale listings.
quickActions.assignManagersDescription: Link verified profiles to courts so owners can keep venue details current.
quickActions.feedbackDescription: Read new member reports, bug notes, and product suggestions.

metrics.liveCourtsHint: Published venues currently visible to players.
metrics.pendingCourtsHint: Community submissions still waiting for review.
metrics.managedCourtsHint: Courts already assigned to an owner or admin contact.
metrics.unreadFeedbackHint: Messages that still need admin triage.
metrics.upcomingCasualPlaysHint: One-time sessions scheduled from today onward.

sections.pendingCourtsEmpty: No court submissions are waiting right now.
sections.casualPlaysEmpty: No upcoming casual plays are scheduled yet.

groups.createSubtitle: Share your sessions so court owners can approve you and new players can find you.

form.name: Group name
form.sessionsEmpty: Add the courts, days, and times you host this group.
form.playerAmountHelp: Approximately how many people show up per session.
form.allowWalkInHelp: Players can join a regular session without asking first. Turn this off if they should contact you before showing up.
form.skillRatingHelp: Optional. Show the player level this group is looking for.
form.success: Group created successfully. Add photos to help courts verify you.
